reviews.body: Jodie has been so helpful and lovely to deal with. She always made everything clear and simple, and nothing was ever too much trouble. I’m really sad she’s leaving — she’ll definitely be missed!

If they had a zero stars, I would happily award it to Suffolk Building Society

I’ve been a customer of Suffolk for a number of years and was recently fortunate to clear a large part of my mortgage. Due to a change in circumstances, I reapplied for additional borrowing against my mortgage, which was less then I had cleared only a few months before. Nothing else has chanced in my circumstances, but they declined the additional borrowing. Whilst I understand this is their right, it is the excuse they have given, which baffles and frustrates me.

Apparently, you must say, or give the impression that you will have the mortgage and be a customer for at least 6 years (despite taking out a 2 year fixed rate deal), or they will automatically decline you. I was honest with my intent to clear the mortgage at the end of the two year fixed rate deal, and this was the reason they declined me. I’m still in shock!

This, coupled with the poor customer service means I will definitely be moving from Suffolk to another provider asap.

When my fixed rate mortgage came to an end and I became eligible to switch, I contacted Suffolk Building Society by telephone to find out what products might be available to me. From that first call right through to completion, I have received excellent service from every single one of the team with whom I have spoken....Zoey, Joe, Raj and especially Stephen. As an elderly person, I appreciate very much the patience and clarity of all the team. Every step of the way, all details were described and any clarification I needed was provided which meant I could make a decision as to what was appropriate for me with confidence. In addition to the mortgage, I wished to arrange Buildings and Contents insurance. This was accomplished with the same calm, friendly, reassuring efficiency. I am most grateful to everyone concerned.

It was a pleasure discussing my application with Stephen. Throughout the process, he was quick to respond, knowledgeable, and professional. This was a breath of fresh air compared to other providers. My application progressed smoothly and was completed successfully.

We received some excellent service today by Rachel at the Felixstowe branch who went through our options explaining the assortment of accounts and operating them by online, post or in person. So refreshing to be able to talk face to face with some good old fashioned service.
Andrea at Saxmundham branch was very sympathetic and understanding when my recently bereaved Mother’s cheque went astray and Barclays Bank were not interested.  Thank you so much.

Mightily impressed with all staff from reception through to senior managers. Polite, well informed and capable people top to bottom. The overall efficiency of customer relations made us feel valued and very respected.
Always easy to make appointments to see someone.
I was very impressed with the professional service in how my appointment was conducted a very helpful and valuable member of staff.
Friendly advice and finance near my home. Face to face service.
